name: get_customer_info
description: Retrieve a customer's account details by their customer ID, including name, address, phone number, account type, and balance

name: delete_customer_record
description: Permanently delete a customer record from the registry by their customer ID

customer_id.description: The customer's unique identifier to delete (e.g., 'C001', 'C005')

name: search_bank_qa
description: Search the Online Bank knowledge base to answer product questions about credit cards, payments and statements

query.description: The question or topic to search for (e.g., 'credit card', 'payments', 'statements')
